auto_create.description: Determines if the database user should be automatically created if it does not exist.

cluster_identifier.description: The unique identifier of the Redshift cluster for which credentials are being generated.

db_groups.description: A set of existing database groups that the user should join.

db_name.description: The name of the database for which the credentials are created.

db_user.description: The name of the database user for whom credentials are being generated.

duration_seconds.description: The time period in seconds for which the generated credentials should remain valid.
